Create Cursor CsEstoque (Emps c(3), Grupos c(10))

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector', ThisForm.Name)

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
	
		With ThisForm.GrdEstoque
			.Recordsource = 'CsEstoque'
			.Column1.Controlsource = 'CsEstoque.Emps'
			.Column2.Controlsource = 'CsEstoque.Grupos'
		EndWith
		
		Select CsEstoque
		Append Blank
			
		=DoDefault()

	Else
		=Messagebox('Impossivel Efetuar Conexăo com Servidor de Banco de Dados...', 0+48, 'CreateObject')
		Return .f.
	EndIf
EndWith
